feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Manage WorkForce API Access in S/4 HANA Public Edition
entry.content:
Greetings,

I'm currently developing a mobile application using APPGyver and need to integrate specific Workforce/Employee data.

While I've encountered a forum post - [Click Here] - that mentions a dedicated CDS View for employee information, it lacks certain data fields I require. Specifically, I'm searching for:

• Field 1: Manager of the Employee

• Field 2: Cost Center of the Employee

Any guidance or direction to access these fields would be greatly appreciated.

 

Regards

Rahul Jain

entry.title: Find Text object Code from SO10 smartforms
entry.content:
Hello Mates, 

I am currently working with Smart Forms and have encountered an issue with an include text. When attempting to find the actual code in SO10 using the text name and text ID, the system returns no results. Could you advise on what specific input is required to retrieve the underlying code for the text?

entry.title: How to read AIF logs from ABAP code(RAP) in S4 HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement to fetch the log messages from AIF Message dashboard app on S4 HANA public cloud.

We are developing a custom report using RestFul ABAP (RAP ) and we are stuck at a place how to read the error log messages for an asynchronous API to know the status of Asset created in the system.

( API- https://api.sap.com/api/FIXEDASSETCREATEMAIN/overview )

We are able to see the AIF logs in the message monitoring( Message dashoard ) fiori apps, but the same AIF message we would want to fetch into custom ABAP RAP code.

Could not find relevant information on the community , hence posting this question.

Appreciate if some one  provide a solution how to achieve this.

regards,

Kumar

entry.title: How to resolve Error reading InfoProvider for CDS view?
entry.content:
Hi,

Am facing issue while activating consumption CDS view. Please check screen print and let me know how to fix this issu.

 

Thanks,

Vinitha

entry.title: Why can't I add an ABAP Cloud package in the Configure Software Packages application?
entry.content:
Hi all,

why can't I add an ABAP Cloud package (Package with ABAP Language Version - ABAP for Cloud Developent) in the "Configure Software Packages" app?

When I want to register the package I get the message - Package ZPACK cannot be used. Check the settings of software component ZCOMP

I thought the key user extensibility was TIER-1, considering the 3-TIER extensibility. According to this error message, the key user extension would then end up in TIER 2/3, right? 

Hint: I work with S/4 2022 On-Premise

Thank you in advance for your help

regards 

Claus

entry.title: how to display value of Contract Start in header of VA03 BAPI ?
entry.content:
hi everyone,

i just add 2 new field(Contract Start and Contract End) in VA03 Header via

SPRO -> Sales Document Header -> Define Sales Document Types.

 

and as u can see its already showed up in VA05 Header : 

and now i want to make that 2 new field is auto filled just like Req. Delivery Date,Shipto filled and Soldto Field right after selecting document and press Execute in VA03.

can someone tell me how can i achieve that ? 

Note : im really new in ABAP and because English is not my mother tongue, so please tell me if my question is not Clear enough so i can try to make it more Clear . Thanks All 🙂

entry.title: How do I extract data from SAP R/3 (4.7) ?
entry.content:
Hi,

As we are trying to migrate data from SAP R/3 (Version 4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public) through staging tables, could you please suggest possible ways to extract data from version 4.7? We need to extract all fields and tables (both specified and unspecified/classified and non-classified) from R/3.

We have attempted to extract data using transaction code SE16N, but we couldn't extract all tables, especially the classified ones. By using transaction code RSO2 for custom data source creation, we managed to extract some data, but not all fields from the tables. Kindly suggest possible ways to achieve complete data extraction, including any other transaction codes that may be useful.

Thank you.

entry.title: Info type pop ups interrupting back ground jobs
entry.content:
Hi,
I am running a mass back ground job for a Z*prog(se38) which calls other Z*FM to do some FI postings by  
That Z* FM pops-up an info type 'msg i' pops-up for certain validations and i have to hit enter to continue.

So when i schedule my Z* prog in background, this pop up msg  is interrupting the background jobs. How do i suppress this pop up msg in my Z* prog?

 pls suggest.

entry.title: insufficient privilege: error while preview the calculation view sap hana studio
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing the below error while preview the calculation view in Hana studio. Even with system user same error arrise and blocked me to preview the View data in sap Hana studio . I checked and maintained all the required privileges to user.

I would Appreciate If you reply .

Error executing the Query.

 

Error: SAP DBTech JDBC: [258]: insufficient privilege: Detailed info for this error can be found with guid

'99A43C7A1FE66649B45E96AF3734DEB2'

SAP HANA studio SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment  SAP HANA multi-model processing

entry.title: Custom value help for Custom Business Object in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are trying to assign value help for custom business object using the standard value help of Material in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, but the value help is not fetching any data.

We are replicating the below mentioned Blog 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/adding-a-value-help-for-custom-business-object-fields/ba-p/13539317

Please let me know if anyone has successfully added a valuehelp in a Custom Business Object.

Thanks

@rosydp

entry.title: I am looking for Get & Post methods for custom Api for cloud tenant. Please guide me
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am looking for the area, where we need to maintain the code for custom validation at Get & Post methods for custom API at public cloud tenant. Please guide me to the correct way.

entry.title: SELECT ROW at REUSE ALV
entry.content:
Hi, i am sorry for my break english.

My question;

How can i select row in reuse alv and i must have get this row index.I am using standart screen in this program,

so that i think  'call method get_selected_rows '  not enable.

Please bright me.

entry.title: ABAP Solution instance and xsuaa creation failed - ABAP MTA
entry.content:
Team,
I am trying to do the tutorial for SaaS enablement in ABAP.
Deploy and enable the SaaS application for consumer access | SAP Tutorials

Expected Output:

 



I am not able successfully create the instance for "ABAP Solution" and "XSUAA"

Below is error log 

This is the list of services post deployment

 


any inputs or right direction would be appreciated

 

Regards,
Vishnu

entry.title: How to create qr code in smartform
How to put fiori app check just like SY-TCODE check in sap backend enhancement
entry.content:
In SAP Backend, when any customer exit/BADI is called from multiple tcodes then we can keep a check of SY-TCODE so that cusotmer exit code will be executed only in particular case.
Do we have similar field when calls are coming from standard fiori app? There is one customer exit getting called from 2 different fiori apps but need restriction for only 1 app.

entry.title: OPEN DATASET syntax for Unicode and non-Unicode, mixed data
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

(1) Our ECC system is non-unicode system

We have a custom prog it is reading Acc. doc BKPF data and storing in App server, then other legacy non-SAP system is consuming the same data from App server, this prog has below syntax

OPEN DATASET <file name> FOR OUTPUT IN TEXT MODE MESSAGE <my messsages>

ENCODING DEFAULT

TRANSFER <my rec> TO <file name>

The above is worked fine

(2) Recently we unicode enabled our ECC system,

Then the receiving / consuming non-SAP legacy system is throwing an error as "Truncation of a record occurred during I/O operation"

After investigation we saw that the NBSP (Non blank space in Notepad++) in BKPF-BKTXT is causing the issue of truncation then we  changed the ABAP syntax to as below

OPEN DATASET <file name> FOR OUTPUT IN TEXT MODE MESSAGE <my messsages>

ENCODING NON-UNICODE

Worked fine, no longer NBSP issue

(3) But yesterday we got dump in SAP as CONVT_CODEPAGE with below message

"When converting a text from code page '4102' to code page '1100', either
- characters are detected that cannot be displayed in one of the two code pages or
- the conversion could not be carried out for another reason"

(4) So it means that the BKPF-BKTXT (free/long text) has non-unicode for some acc. docs and unicode text for some other acc. docs

Pls. let us know a syntax that works for non-unicode text and unicode text, can we go with BINARY format like below,

OPEN DATASET <fine name> FOR OUTPUT IN BINARY MODE

entry.title: Instance Feature Control of a field in Action button - Update
entry.content: I need all fields to be editable based on specific conditions tied to actions and data stored in a table. How can I ensure that even when attempting to modify a feature instance, all fields from the CDS are included?

entry.title: Resource not found for segment 'XXXXXX'
entry.content:
Hi, I am getting this error in SAP gateway Resource not found for Segment 'XXXXXX' when clicking on a Fiori app to get data.

I am working on a Fiori app getting data in sap gateway for that entity set but in Fiori app getting error mentioned above.
Tried cleaning up cache and loading metadata and regenerating the project in SAP Gateway Service Builder (SEGW).
I'm getting data in sap gateway for that entity but not in the Fiori app.
Can anyone let me know how I can fix this error?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Purchasing Info Record and Conditions joining condition in CDS on S/4 Hana Cloud
entry.content:
In S/4 Hana Cloud, I have created a purchasing info record document and created 2 conditions with different prices. Now I want to create a list report based on that. However, I cannot find the joining condition between these two. 

I have used I_PURCHASINGINFORECORDAPI01 and I_PURGPRCGCONDITIONRECORD for creating the report but didn't find a suitable condition for joining. 

Can anyone assist me in getting the joining condition?

entry.title: Intercompany Billing not getting generated.
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,
I am working on Intercompany Billing and for some reason, the invoice is not getting generated occasionally. This issue is not every time but its occurring sporadically. 
I have tried to debug but couldnt find anything. 
Can someone help me understand where can I be going wrong and where can I check to find whats happening?

Since this issue is a sporadic error I think there is no issue in the config part, but I am really confused to why this may happen.
Please help me understand where I can look for the possible error

Thank you
